name: Royal Dusit Golf Club
notes: LOCATION MISMATCH: Royal Dusit Golf Club is NOT in Hua Hin — it is located in central Bangkok at 183 Phitsanulok Road, Suanchitlada, Dusit district, Bangkok 10300, next to the Royal Turf Club horse racing track. It was included in the pipeline as course #8 under 'Hua Hin' with a note about possible connection to the Dusit Thani Hua Hin hotel brand. The Dusit Thani Hua Hin hotel does offer golf packages, but these use other nearby Hua Hin courses, not this Bangkok facility. Royal Dusit Golf Club is one of only two golf courses within Bangkok city proper. Par 65 (short course at 4,330 yards). Year opened approximately 1926 (some sources say 1903 for the broader Royal Turf Club / Suan Chitlada estate). The All Square Golf profile notes the course is 'currently closed.' Green fees of ~500 THB and caddie 400 THB are from Albrecht Golf Guide (1golf.eu) and may be outdated (2014 era data). No carts on fairways (pull carts only). Night golf available. The Dusit Thani hotel in Hua Hin links to nearby courses such as Springfield Royal Country Club for their stay-and-play packages. The pipeline slug 'royal-dusit-golf-club' should be reviewed — if the intent was a Hua Hin-area Dusit-branded course, it may not exist as a standalone facility.
